title: Aniko's Roleplay Mod
description:
Aniko's Roleplay Mod is a lightweight mod majorly focused on Roleplay. The mod contains 100+ new commands with a variety of functions. They're split into 8 different categories.

Chat, Misc, Character, Relation, Item, Writing, Dice, Operator.
body:
Aniko here. This mod was made as a passion project, so updates will be infrequent; however, I have finished porting it to multiple Forge and Fabric versions, so I'm pretty happy with the state it's in. Oftentimes, the 1.20.1 Forge version will be the most recently updated and the least buggy. If you find any bugs or have suggestions for the mod, you can contact me through Discord. @asioko

(Note: future forge 1.20.2 versions & forge 1.21.1 versions are being discontinued. Many features that are on 1.20.2 & 1.21.1 have optional mod dependencies in which the mods don't exist for normal Forge.)

Certain features only work with Aniko's Nameplate Addon mod; they are optional features. The only reason these features are separated into another mod is that they're client-side. [Aniko's Nameplate Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/anikos-nameplate-addon)

Here is what the mod adds in eight different categories, assuming you are the most updated version of the mod;

# [Chat]

/chatmode <global | local | whisper | shout | roleplay> - change your active chat mode

/chatcolor <hex> - set your chat color

/chatcolor gradient <hex1> <hex2> - set a gradient chat color

/chatcolor reset - reset your chat color


# [Character]

/characters - open the character management GUI

/character create <name> - create and switch to a character

/character switch <character> - switch active character

/character delete <character> - delete one of your characters

/character list - list saved characters

/character namemask <name> - temporarily mask your character name

/character namemask clear - clear your active name mask

/character set Name <value> - set your character name

/character set Age <value> - set your character age

/character set Race <value> - set your character race

/character set Gender <value> - set your character gender

/character set Pronouns <value> - set your character pronouns

/character set Residence <value> - set a residence

/character set Pronunciation <value> - set your character's pronuncation

/character set Height <value> set your character height (scale your character if you have Pehkui, optional.)

/character set scale <0.75-1.25> 

/character set Appearance - type appearance text in chat after the prompt; supports appending and manual formatting

/character set Artlink <url> - set a clickable art link

/character view <character> - view a character card

/characteruser <RP name> - find the Minecraft username behind an RP name

/character lastseen <character> - finds last time a character was used

/character compare <character>,<character> - compares 2 characters

/character search <option> <text> - search specific things about characters

/character color <hex> <hex> - sets your own character color, only viewable for yourself

/character color <character> <hex> <hex> - sets other people's character colors, only viewable for yourself

/status <text> - set your active character status for hover cards

/status clear - clear your active character status

# [Relations]

/relations - open the relations GUI

/relation set <character> - type the relation in chat after the prompt

/relation change <character> - type the new relation in chat after the prompt

/relation remove <character> - remove your relation to a character

/relation view <character> - view a character's relations

/relation color <character> - type one or two hex colors after the prompt to color that relation

/note set <character> - type a private note in chat; supports appending with --

/note view <character> - view your private notes

/note remove <character> - remove all private notes for that character

/note list - list characters you have notes for

# [Writing]

/documents - open the documents GUI

/mail - open your mail GUI

/mail <character> - send the held letter, document, or journal to another character's mailbox

/document create <title> - create a document

/document title <title> - rename the held document

/document body - type document text in chat after the prompt; supports appending with -- and manual formatting

/document sign - sign the held document with your active character name

/letter create <title> <recipient> - create a letter

/letter body - type letter text in chat after the prompt; supports appending with -- and manual formatting

/letter seal - seal the held letter

/journal create <title> - receive a writable journal book

/journal save - save the held written journal into your journal storage

/journals - open the journals GUI

# [Misc]

/format <bold | italics | strikethrough | underline | smalltext | bigtext | obfuscate | upsidedown> - toggle chat formatting

/format reset - clear your active formatting

/font <normal | smalltext | bigtext | upsidedown> - set your font variant

/togglepunc - toggle automatic punctuation

/clearappend - clear appended text

/headset - set your active character menu head to your current skin head

/kit create <name> - creates a kit based on your current inventory (Operator command)

/kit <name> - allows a player to claim a single kit (can no longer claim kits after, this is for roleplay purposes upon making a character)

/kit <username> reset - allows a player to choose another kit 

/playtime - gives playtime for your current character

/playtimeall - gives playtime across all your characters

/prompt cancel - allows you to cancel certain prompts

/prompt preview - allows you to preview certain prompts

/IC - sets your tag to IC (In character) in Nameplate & Tab (only works with Aniko's Nameplate Addon Installed.)

/CIC - sets your tag to CIC (Can be in character) in Nameplate & Tab (only works with Aniko's Nameplate Addon Installed.)

/afk - sets your tag to AFK (Away from keyboard) in Nameplate & Tab (only works with Aniko's Nameplate Addon Installed.)

/ooc - sets your tag to OOC (Out of character) in Nameplate & Tab (only works with Aniko's Nameplate Addon Installed.)


Manual Formatting (symbols go on both sides of a text) * italics ** bold  __ underline ~~ strikethrough || obsfucate ^^ upsidedown " Dialogue


Ending a message with -- appends it to your next message.

# [Item]

/change item lore - type item lore in chat after the prompt; supports appending with -- and manual formatting

/change item name <name> - change the held item's name

/change item color <hex> <hex2> - set held item name color or gradient

/change item lorecolor <hex> <hex2> - set held item lore color or gradient

/change item command add <command> - attach a command to a held item

/change item command list - list attached commands on the held item

/change item command clear - clear attached commands from the held item

/itemmeta set <key> <value> - set RP metadata on the held item

/itemmeta get <key> - view RP metadata from the held item

/itemmeta remove <key> - remove RP metadata from the held item

/itemmeta clear - clear all RP metadata from the held item

/inspectitem - inspect the held item's name, lore, metadata, and item ID

/signitem - sign the held item with your active character name

# [Dice]

/roll <dice> - roll publicly, like /roll d20, /roll 2d6, or /roll d20+5

/roll advantage <dice> - roll twice and keep the higher result

/roll disadvantage <dice> - roll twice and keep the lower result

/roll hidden <dice> - show the roll only to yourself and operators

/roll private <dice> - show the roll only to yourself

/coinflip - flip a public coin

# [Operator]

/chatstaff - enter staff chat

/chatevent - enter event chat mode

/chatevent <message> - send one event message

/colortoggle - toggle color and gradient support for global and local chat

# Optional Mod Support
No mods are required here, but optionally add more functionality to the mod.

Works with [Origins Forge] Saves Origins between characters (Currently only 1.20.1 mainline forge version, broken on other versions, will fix later!)

Works with [Pehkui] makes /character  set height actually scale your character, makes /character set scale <0.75-1.25> function 

Works with any mod using [Curios API] for trinket slots, so they save properly between characters
